title: Campaign Monitor vs Ghost (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Campaign Monitor vs Ghost: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Ghost: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Campaign Monitor and Ghost comes down to your specific use case. Campaign Monitor is built for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Ghost targets writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

comparison_table.tool_a: Agencies And Teams Managing Multiple Brands
comparison_table.tool_b: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on agencies and teams managing multiple brands
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Ghost?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Campaign Monitor wins for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Ghost is stronger for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Ghost?
faq.a: Ghost starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Ghost to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
